title: Sable Pathfinder
description: Sable addon that improves mob pathfinding across Sable sub-levels.
body:
Sable Pathfinder improves mob navigation for worlds using the Sable mod.

By default, Minecraft mob pathfinding is built around static world coordinates, which can break down when mobs interact with Sable sub-levels and moving structures. This addon helps mobs create and refresh paths across Sable sub-level boundaries, including movement from the normal world onto a sub-level, from a sub-level back into the world, and between different sub-levels.

The mod is designed for servers and modpacks that use Sable and want mobs to behave more naturally around dynamic structures, ships, platforms, or other moving sub-level builds.

## Features

- Improves mob pathfinding across Sable sub-levels
- Recalculates paths when mobs change the sub-level they are standing on
- Supports world-to-sub-level, sub-level-to-world, and sub-level-to-sub-level navigation
- Helps mobs follow targets and destinations more reliably around moving Sable structures
- Server-side gameplay behavior improvement
